name: Swedish Rye Bread#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, honey, butter, salt, caraway seeds, and orange peel in a large bowl.
2. Mix in the rye flour, bread flour, and yeast until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Use the basic cycle setting on your bread machine to bake the dough.
4. If you have an old recipe for Swedish Limpa by hand, consider converting it to a bread machine recipe with the help of Linda Rehberg and Lois Conway. They would be happy to assist you with any issues.
